description:
Walked the wave-205 candidate set and found two parallel orphan-mirror situations from today's trivia drops — (1) Nylea's Forerunner THB-186 just got trivia naming Nylea-via-MTG-Wiki-Associated-cards-listing while the nylea node was missing this card from `appears_on:`, and (2) Glimpse of Freedom THB-50 just got trivia naming Clint Cearley + Sweet Oblivion-pair while the clint-cearley node was missing Glimpse from `appears_on:` (corpus credit count would go 4→5). Picked the Nylea attach for stronger substrate impact: 6→7 anchors (now exceeds [[mogis]] sub-node's 6-anchor stack by one), adds a fresh anchor register (constellation-marked-cohort-operative-beast / divine-forest-creature-as-Nyx-born-unstoppable-charge) the node didn't previously have at single-beast individual-anchor scope, and the canonical evidence-tier is the sharpest available (MTG Wiki's own 'Associated cards' enumeration on its Nylea page — verbatim Wizards-curated reference-listing). Mechanically the card's 'Other creatures you control have trample' oracle text is the exact parallel of Nylea, God of the Hunt's (THS-166) trample-granting clause, designer-coordinated print-cycle continuity at the rules-text level — the Forerunner is canonically the cohort-operative-beast of the herd the god-card commands. Three-sided write: (1) card frontmatter `characters: [nylea]` block-form added, (2) card body `## Connections` section appended after Related cards with single-bullet wikilink citing MTG Wiki Associated-cards listing + Scryfall oracle-text mechanical-parallel + Nyx-born constellation-creature iconography, (3) nylea node `appears_on:` extended (in-set sequence between Inspire Awe and Opaline Unicorn), canonical_source field's in-corpus enumeration extended, body card-count updated 6→7 (three spots: section header, thesis paragraph, bundle-anchor caveat), in-corpus-card-flavor-text-passes line in Canonical sources extended, body anchor-bullet inserted between Inspire Awe and Opaline Unicorn entries with full register prose, rendered wikilink block extended.

The Glimpse-of-Freedom→Cearley attach is the next-pass move; staged in next_pass_suggestions with the structural argument (THB Underworld-pair designer-assignment-pattern parallel to the existing 'Cearley got the Eldrazi-coded slots in BFZ' node-body claim). Option C considered: Xenagos sub-node proposal (Forerunner trivia surfaced Xenagos-imprisoned-Nylea lore + Blood Aspirant THB-128 and Careless Celebrant THB-129 carry Xenagos flavor-attribution). Refused with reason — all three Xenagos mentions are flavor-attribution / trivia-narrative-context tier, none are depiction-of-Xenagos-figure tier. Nylea node's existing 'Future Heliod / Erebos / Purphoros / Pharika sub-nodes' caveat sets the threshold as '≥3 substantive anchors' meeting this Nylea sub-node's anchor evidence-tier — Xenagos has 0 cult-operative-depiction anchors in corpus, only flavor-mentions. Staged in next_pass_suggestions as future-watch with explicit threshold-cross condition. Mr. Nodeley would be premature.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Nylea, God of the Hunt — 'Associated cards' section explicitly lists Nylea's Forerunner alongside Huntmaster, Mantle of the Wolf, Plummet, et al.]
[Scryfall: Nylea's Forerunner THB-186 type_line='Enchantment Creature — Beast', oracle text 'Trample\nOther creatures you control have trample']
[Scryfall: Nylea, God of the Hunt THS-166 oracle text — trample-granting clause parallel to Forerunner's]

[In-corpus: cards/magic-the-gathering/theros-beyond-death/186-nylea-s-forerunner.md trivia bullet 1 — Nylea's Forerunner is listed explicitly under 'Associated cards' in MTG Wiki's in-game references for Nylea]
[Potion rule sub-rule 2 — hub-attribution must survive a 'canonical citation?' question; MTG Wiki Associated-cards listing is Wizards-curated tier]

edges_added.evidence_tier: MTG Wiki Associated-cards listing + mechanical-parallel-to-Nylea-god-card + Nyx-born constellation-creature iconography
edges_added.anchor_register: constellation-marked-cohort-operative-beast / divine-forest-creature-as-Nyx-born-unstoppable-charge — new register at single-beast individual-anchor scope, complementing the existing beast-pack-avatar manifestation register Inspire Awe THB-175 anchors

moves_refused_with_reason.move: Mr. Nodeley xenagos sub-node proposal under [[theros-pantheon]]
moves_refused_with_reason.reason: Surfaced by Forerunner trivia (Xenagos-imprisoned-Nylea-in-beast-form lore) + Blood Aspirant THB-128 trivia ('Satyrs on Theros are Dionysian figures aligned with Xenagos') + Careless Celebrant THB-129 trivia ('satyrs are associated with Xenagos'). All three are flavor-attribution / trivia-narrative-context tier — none are depiction-of-Xenagos-figure or Xenagos-cult-operative-depiction tier. Nylea node's existing caveat sets threshold as '≥3 substantive anchors' at the cult-operative-depicted / flavor-text-named-in-card-title / canonical-iconography-depicted tier. Xenagos has 0 anchors at that tier in current corpus. Future-watch: when a Xenagos-cult-operative card lands (e.g. a satyr revel-leader explicitly depicting Xenagos, or a Xenagos planeswalker card from THS / BNG / JOU) — then sub-node becomes commission-ready. Currently the three Xenagos flavor-mentions are adequately captured at parent [[theros-pantheon]] node's roster-enumeration level.

moves_refused_with_reason.move: Bundle Forerunner attach + Cearley-Glimpse-attach into single pass
moves_refused_with_reason.reason: Single-invocation rule (memory `bbl-swarm-staggering` — ONE Edgelord per wave invocation, one change per invocation). Forerunner attach + Glimpse-Cearley attach are independent moves to independent nodes — bundling them would violate the discipline. Staged Cearley move in next_pass_suggestions.

Surfaced by Glimpse of Freedom THB-50 trivia ('the Nyklean school is based on Stoicism, teaching that reason and destiny underlie all reality'). Density: 1 card in corpus carrying Nyklean-school flavor-attribution. Below threshold for layer-node graduation. Staged in next_pass_suggestions / janitor_triage as future-watch with explicit density-trigger condition.

other_candidates_considered: Glimpse of Freedom (THB-50) → [[clint-cearley]] artist-node attach: corpus credit count goes 4→5 with Glimpse added (Sheer Drop BFZ-48, Nettle Drone BFZ-131, Sweet Oblivion THB-70, Volcanic Geyser M21-171 currently; Glimpse THB-50 would be the 5th). Glimpse + Sweet Oblivion is canonically a THB Underworld-environment-paired commission (the trivia bullet on Glimpse names this explicitly), parallel to the existing Cearley-got-BFZ-Eldrazi-coded-slots designer-assignment-pattern. Cearley node's 'Stylistic signature — Pallid / washed-out backgrounds as compositional bed' bullet specifically lists Sweet Oblivion's pale storm-sea sky as canonical signature; Glimpse's deep-indigo / cold-blue Underworld floor extends the same restraint to a 5th register. Strong move, staged for next-pass.

Eutropia the Twice-Favored (THB-216) suspected_ip resolution: card has subject_known_ip: true, suspected_ip: Eutropia, ip_confidence: high, ip_verified: false. Eutropia is a canonical named-character (twice-favored demigod, devotee of both Nylea and Thassa per flavor text). Density: 1 card in corpus. Per the Heliod-sub-node-proposal precedent (wave 204), single-card density is below threshold for sub-node graduation under [[theros-pantheon]] unless the card represents a uniquely-positioned anchor (e.g. last-of-twelve-principal-pantheon-members). Eutropia is a demigod (minor pantheon tier), not a principal pantheon member — graduates to sub-node only when 2+ Eutropia cards in corpus OR when a Eutropia-cult-operative card lands. Future-watch.

Ilysian Caryatid (THB-174) Ilysia-afterlife setting → potential Athreos sub-node: Ilysia is a protected realm of the Underworld for hero-dwellers per the flavor text, which is Athreos's domain-of-jurisdiction (god of passage / soul-shepherding). Athreos sub-node still wave-204 deferred — Ilysian Caryatid alone is one anchor + Glimpse of Freedom's Erebos-adjacent escape arc is a second anchor in Underworld-domain register. Two anchors; below the 3-anchor threshold. Still future-watch — when the third Athreos-domain or Athreos-flavor-attribution card enters corpus, sub-node becomes commission-ready.

Wrap in Flames (THB-164) nightmare-horses-through-fire vision → potential Phenax or Erebos sub-node connection: nightmare-horse iconography in Theros is canonically Erebos-domain (the Underworld's psychopomp-mounts). Density: 1 card. Below threshold. Future-watch.

Glory Bearers (THB-17) Heliod-anchor citation chain → continuation of the wave-204 Heliod-sub-node-proposal work: the Heliod sub-node-proposal was already filed wave 204; Glory Bearers' trivia attaches a fresh canonical-anchor citation chain (reprinted in Jumpstart 2022 + Foundations Jumpstart). The follow-up attach is staged in the wave-204 Heliod sidecar's pending next-pass.

Refusal-with-receipts as the entire pass: considered. The Forerunner→nylea attach is unambiguous canonical-evidence-tier work and clears the substrate-impact bar (6→7 anchors, new register, exceeds mogis sibling depth). Refusal would have been wrong this wave. Saved for next wave if a wave-205 follow-up tries to push a thinner move.
next_pass_suggestions: Glimpse of Freedom (THB-50) → [[clint-cearley]] artist-node attach. Standard three-sided write — Glimpse already has artist: 'Clint Cearley' in frontmatter (no artist-frontmatter add needed; artist field is a string-typed credit not a layer-cohort-list); update clint-cearley.md `appears_on:` (add `magic-the-gathering/theros-beyond-death/50-glimpse-of-freedom` between Sweet Oblivion and Volcanic Geyser per current set-ordering), update node body 'Cards in our corpus' section adding Glimpse as a fifth bullet (register: Theros-Underworld-environment / wide-overhead-perspective / spiraling-light-paths-in-cold-blue palette — close cousin to Sweet Oblivion's pallid grotesque seascape but in Underworld-floor register rather than ocean-surface register), update 'Bundle-anchor potential' to add a fifth bullet (THB-Underworld-environment-pair cohort: Glimpse + Sweet Oblivion as Cearley's twin THB pieces — same designer-assignment-pattern as the BFZ Eldrazi-coded-slots claim, now confirmed across two blocks), update 'Cross-set register span across BBL corpus' paragraph to reflect that THB carries TWO Cearley credits now (not one), update rendered Appears-on wikilink block, update node count claim '105 unique Scryfall artworks across BBL corpus four confirmed credits' → '105 unique Scryfall artworks across BBL corpus five confirmed credits across three sets'. Sonnet-shape work — endpoints named, move pre-verdicted.

Symmetric Connections-bullet from [[nylea]] node anchor list — none needed because Nylea is the LAYER-NODE side; the card-side `## Connections` bullet IS the orphan-mirror reciprocal (per `bbl-wikilink-scope-shift`, layer-node `appears_on:` + rendered wikilink block IS the node-side mirror; no body bullet needed on the node).

Future-watch (carried forward + new): Xenagos sub-node under [[theros-pantheon]] — when a Xenagos-cult-operative-depicted card OR a Xenagos planeswalker card lands in corpus (THS / BNG / JOU Xenagos planeswalker printings would trigger immediately; satyr-revel-leader-explicitly-depicting-Xenagos would also trigger). Currently 3 flavor-mention anchors (Forerunner trivia narrative-context, Blood Aspirant trivia + flavor, Careless Celebrant trivia + flavor) all below cult-operative-depiction threshold. Add to janitor_triage if not already staged.

Future-watch (new): Nyklean school as canonical Therosian Stoicism philosophy — Glimpse of Freedom trivia surfaces Nyklos / Meletian-philosopher / Stoicism-school-of-Theros lore. Density: 1 card. Threshold for philosophy-school-as-node graduation: ≥3 cards with Nyklean-school or Stoic-school flavor attribution. Most Theros-block philosophy-school flavor is unattributed; this is a low-probability future-watch. Add to janitor_triage as low-priority next-watch with density-trigger.

Future-watch (carried forward): Athreos sub-node under [[theros-pantheon]] — Ilysian Caryatid (Ilysia-afterlife Underworld setting) + Glimpse of Freedom (Erebos-adjacent escape arc) = 2 anchors in Athreos-domain register. Below 3-anchor threshold. Already wave-204 deferred.

Future-watch (carried forward): Eutropia sub-node or character-node — currently 1 card in corpus (THB-216), demigod-tier (not principal pantheon). When 2+ Eutropia anchors land OR when a Eutropia-cult-operative card lands, sub-node becomes commission-ready.

Future-watch (carried forward, augmented): Heliod sub-node proposal still pending wave-204 → wave-205 includes Glory Bearers Heliod-anchor as additional substrate when the Heliod sub-node materializes. Erebos sub-node also wave-203 still pending.
